title: About Me
description: I am a passionate and driven developer pursuing a Dual Bachelor in Data Science and Telecommunication Technologies Engineering at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid. My goal is to apply my strong analytical background, software development skills, and Finance minor to create impactful, data-driven solutions. With professional experience spanning front-office automation at Santander CIB and suicide prevention machine learning models at UC3M, I thrive on tackling complex technical challenges and continually expanding my knowledge base. Welcome to my portfolio!
